name: MinusORM
title: Minus ORM Framework
description: ORM Delphi moderno com suporte a Firebird, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, MariaDB, MSSQL, Oracle, DB2. Criteria API, SelectBuilder fluente, Expression type-safe, UnitOfWork, ChangeTracker, IdentityMap, Lazy Loading, Nullable types, Migrations, Cache, SoftDelete, Auditoria, Bulk Operations, Paginacao, JSON serialization, Horse REST integration, Async/await e mais.
author: Gabriel Anomaly
